title: PET LOSS SUPPORT PROGRAM - 211info
text: DOVELEWIS VETERINARY EMERGENCY & SPECIALTY HOSPITAL PET LOSS SUPPORT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers in-person and virtual pet loss support group meetings. Provides an annual Service of Remembrance event where pet owners gather to memorialize and honor their pets who have passed. 1945 NW Pettygrove Street Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Individuals and families who are grieving or anticipating the passing of a pet Hours: Varies Email (503) 228-7281 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 228-7281 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet NW 18th and Raleigh stop. Parking lot next to building. Services: Pet Loss Support Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - EMERGENCY AND URGENT CARE SERVICES DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - VELVET ASSISTANCE FUND If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DOVELEWIS VETERINARY EMERGENCY & SPECIALTY HOSPITAL
